---
title: "Data Science Portfolio"
subtitle: "Welcome to my Data & AI Portfolio."
---

This portfolio highlights how I leverage data, analytics, machine learning, and AI to solve complex business problems, improve operational performance, and support executive decision-making at enterprise scale.

Throughout my career leading technology, analytics, and transformation initiatives across multi-brand and high-transaction organizations, I have built data-driven solutions spanning predictive modeling, business intelligence, operational analytics, automation, and digital optimization.

The examples presented here reflect real-world applications of SQL, Python, Power BI, machine learning, and cloud technologies to drive measurable business impact — including revenue growth, operational efficiency, customer experience, and strategic visibility.

This portfolio represents my approach to modern leadership at the intersection of technology, business strategy, data, and AI.
